rag_rules: Assume and guarantee statements must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings and assignments must be placed in component implementation annexes
References in AGREE contracts must resolve to visible identifiers in the current scope or declared helpers
generic_rules: AGREE expressions must have valid types; unresolved references result in '<error>' types that break contract validity
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-specific subcomponents or ports directly
AGREE scalar types must use int, real, and bool; invalid type names cause resolution failures
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Assume and guarantee statements are only valid in component type scopes
Helper declarations (const, eq) must define valid types and resolve all referenced identifiers
anti_patterns: Placing assume/guarantee statements in component implementations instead of types
Referencing undeclared or out-of-scope identifiers in AGREE expressions
irrelevant_topics: AADL package specification and empty package diagnostics
Component type and implementation structure extraction
